images.name: caddy-http2
images.capabilityProof: docker run --rm incursa-protocol-lab-caddy-http2:0.1.0 caddy version prints v2.11.2

commands.configTestTemplate: docker run --rm incursa-protocol-lab-caddy-http2:0.1.0 caddy validate --config /etc/caddy/Caddyfile --adapter caddyfile
commands.serverTemplate: docker run --rm -p <port>:8080/tcp incursa-protocol-lab-caddy-http2:0.1.0 caddy run --config /etc/caddy/Caddyfile --adapter caddyfile

knownLimitations: This package intentionally exposes only cleartext HTTP/2 prior knowledge (h2c) on its target port.
TLS with ALPN h2 is not configured or claimed; it requires a separate certificate-bearing package and compatible executor.
The existing go-http2-executor is the compatible executor for this package and fails closed on HTTP/1 fallback.
